metadata.raw: {"ID":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/id/nisr/2025/185","TITLE":"The Occupational Pensions (Revaluation) Order (Northern Ireland) 2025","LINK (SELF)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/id/nisr/2025/185","LINK":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/nisr/2025/185/2025-11-25","LINK (XML)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/nisr/2025/185/2025-11-25/data.xml","LINK (RDF/XML)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/nisr/2025/185/2025-11-25/data.rdf","LINK (AKN)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/nisr/2025/185/2025-11-25/data.akn","LINK (HTML snippet)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/nisr/2025/185/2025-11-25/data.xht","LINK (Website (XHTML) Default View)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/nisr/2025/185/2025-11-25/data.htm","LINK (PDF)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/nisr/2025/185/2025-11-25/data.pdf","LINK (Table of Contents)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/nisr/2025/185/contents","AUTHOR":"","UPDATED":"2025-12-03T07:56:49Z","PUBLISHED":"2025-11-27T03:04:24.573803Z","DocumentMainType":"NorthernIrelandStatutoryRule","YEAR":"2025","NUMBER":"185","ISBN":"'9780338025524'","CreationDate":"2025-11-25","SUBJECT":"PENSIONS","Supersedes":"","CATEGORY":"PENSIONS","SUMMARY":"This Order, which corresponds to an Order (S.I. 2025/1211) made by the Secretary of State for Work and Pensions under paragraph 2(1) of Schedule 3 to the Pension Schemes Act 1993, specifies appropriate revaluation percentages. The percentages specified are relevant to the revaluation of benefits under occupational pension schemes, as required by section 80 of, and Schedule 2 to, the Pension Schemes (Northern Ireland) Act 1993. The lower revaluation percentage introduced by the Pensions (No. 2) Act (Northern Ireland) 2008 (c. 13 (N.I.)) does not apply to pensionable service before 6th April 2009.","":""}

2025 Alternative versions: Prospective - Amendment 25/11/2025 Point in time Status: Point in time view as at 25/11/2025. This version of this Rule contains provisions that are prospective. Status The term provision is used to describe a definable element in a piece of legislation that has legislative effect – such as a Part, Chapter or section. A version of a provision is prospective either: where the provision (Part, Chapter or section) has never come into force or; where the text of the provision is subject to change, but no date has yet been appointed by the appropriate person or body for those changes to come into force. Commencement Orders listed in the ‘Changes to Legislation’ box as not yet applied may bring this prospective version into force. Changes to legislation: The Occupational Pensions (Revaluation) Order (Northern Ireland) 2025 is up to date with all changes known to be in force on or before 25 December 2025. There are changes that may be brought into force at a future date. Changes that have been made appear in the content and are referenced with annotations. Changes to Legislation Changes and effects yet to be applied by the editorial team are only applicable when viewing the latest version or prospective version of legislation. They are therefore not accessible when viewing legislation as at a specific point in time. To view the ‘Changes to Legislation’ information for this provision return to the latest version view using the options provided in the ‘What Version’ box above. Prospective Statutory Rules of Northern Ireland 2025 No. 185 Pensions The Occupational Pensions (Revaluation) Order (Northern Ireland) 2025 Made 25th November 2025 Coming into operation 1st January 2026 This Order is made in exercise of the powers conferred by paragraph 2(1) of Schedule 2 to the Pension Schemes (Northern Ireland) Act 1993( 1 ) and now vested in the Department for Communities( 2 ). The Secretary of State for Work and Pensions has made an Order( 3 ) under paragraph 2(1) of Schedule 3 to the Pension Schemes Act 1993( 4 ). Accordingly the Department for Communities makes the following Order: Prospective Citation, commencement and interpretation N.I. 1. —(1) This Order may be cited as the Occupational Pensions (Revaluation) Order (Northern Ireland) 2025 and shall come into operation on 1st January 2026. (2) The Interpretation Act (Northern Ireland) 1954( 5 ) shall apply to this Order as it applies to an Act of the Assembly. Commencement Information I1 Art. 1 in operation at 1.1.2026, see art. 1(1) The higher and lower revaluation percentages for each revaluation period N.I. 2. For the purposes of paragraph 2(1) of Schedule 2 to the Pension Schemes (Northern Ireland) Act 1993 (methods of revaluing accrued pension benefits), for each revaluation period specified in column 1 of the Schedule— (a) the higher revaluation percentage is the percentage specified in column 2, and  (b) the lower revaluation percentage, where applicable, is the percentage specified in column 3,  in relation to that period. Commencement Information I2 Art. 2 in operation at 1.1.2026, see art. 1(1) Sealed with the Official Seal of the Department for Communities on 25th November 2025 (L.S.) David Tarr A senior officer of the Department for Communities Prospective Article 2 Schedule 1 N.I.
